title: Expand original assessment content and simulation formats

acceptance_criteria.text: Add a multi-select ("choose TWO/THREE") MCQ format end-to-end: Question.answer accepts number | number[], graded all-or-nothing via a central gradeMcq, rendered as toggleable checkboxes with a "Select N" hint in both Practice and Mock views, and accepted by the content validators.
Author seed multi-select questions (>=3 per track) across A+, Network+, and Security+, mapped to existing objectives, and confirm the full content bank still validates.
Cover the new grading paths with unit tests and keep the build, content, and accessibility checks green.
Additional simulation formats beyond multi-select MCQ (e.g. categorization, fill-in/CLI, hotspot) and bulk multi-select authoring beyond the seed set are deferred to a follow-up.
